verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As I travel through this pilgrim land There is a friend who walks with me He leads me safely through the sinking sand It is the Christ at Calvary

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This would be my prayer, dear Lord, each day To help me do the best I can For I need Thy light to guide me day and night Blessed Jesus, hold my hand

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus, hold my hand I need Thee every hour While through this pilgrim land Protect me by Thy power Hear my feeble plea O Lord, look down on me When I kneel in prayer I know I'll meet You there Blessed Jesus, hold my hand

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I wonder thru the valley dim Toward the setting of the sun Lead me safely to the land of rest If I a crown of life have won I have put my Faith Dear Lord, in thee That I may reach the golden strand There' s no other friend On whom I can defend Blessed Jesus Hold my hand
